title: AI Pipeline Observability
description: Per-stage latency tracing (ALS) over the durable Book Now AI job (queue/image_preprocess/provider/ai/pricing/database/notification) + read-only internal dashboard. Includes the fast-fail provider-stage fix.
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). Observability is inert unless AI_PIPELINE_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED is on.
compatibilityNotes: Backend-agnostic; only the admin dashboard page carries branding.
No customer-facing behavior; inert when flag off.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream work (merged to operion main).

Landed in the Supercharged parity release PR #8 (41ef702 infra + 5233fda instrumentation); bundle re-verified green (tsc/462 tests/117 ai/regression/build, flags OFF) and merged as a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac. Discovery→merged recorded as a bundled reconciliation transition (the parity foundation was validated and merged as one unit).

verification.summary: PR #8 bundle re-verified against head da5fdc8: tsc 0 errors; eslint changed-files 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite 462/462; test:ai 117/117; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ compiled successfully; all new flags default OFF (flag-off = byte-identical).
